plan: Plan 2 — Full Mobile MacBook-Off Parity Runtime

google_oauth.migration_needed: Secure export to cloud secrets manager (AWS SSM/Secrets Manager or equivalent)

github_token.note: Env var can be set on Fargate; but not currently deployed with token

slack_token.note: Env vars can be set on Fargate; file token is local-only

telegram_token.note: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN present in .env; connector diag looks for JARVIS_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN — mismatch

connectors.exact_blocker: Google OAuth token stored in local JSON file — not accessible from Fargate without vault sync
connectors.next_implementation_step: Export Google OAuth token to cloud secrets manager; load from vault on Fargate
connectors.proof_for_acceptance: GET /v1/connectors/gmail from iPhone returns email data while MacBook is off

connectors.exact_blocker: Google OAuth token stored in local JSON file — same blocker as Gmail
connectors.next_implementation_step: Same as Gmail — shared Google OAuth vault migration
connectors.proof_for_acceptance: GET /v1/connectors/gcalendar from iPhone returns calendar data while MacBook is off

connectors.exact_blocker: Google OAuth token stored in local JSON file — same blocker as Gmail
connectors.next_implementation_step: Same as Gmail — shared Google OAuth vault migration
connectors.proof_for_acceptance: GET /v1/connectors/gdrive from iPhone lists drive files while MacBook is off

actions_available: POST /v1/frontdoor/submit (intent: coding) — coding task via frontdoor
connectors.exact_blocker: GITHUB_TOKEN env var not yet deployed to Fargate; Fargate backend token env missing
connectors.next_implementation_step: Add GITHUB_TOKEN to Fargate task definition env vars (or AWS Secrets Manager)
connectors.proof_for_acceptance: GET /v1/connectors/github from iPhone returns repo data while MacBook is off

connectors.auth_required: Slack bot token (env var) or xoxp- user token
connectors.exact_blocker: Slack env var tokens not deployed to Fargate; xoxp- file token is local-only; outbound send is always approval-gated
connectors.next_implementation_step: Add Slack bot token to Fargate env; wire outbound send through approval gate; verify mobile can trigger Slack notification after Bryan approves
connectors.proof_for_acceptance: POST notification via /v1/notify triggers Slack message to confirmed channel after approval; triggered from iPhone

connectors.auth_required: Notion internal integration token (manual setup required)
connectors.exact_blocker: Notion integration token not created — notion.json absent; manual setup required at notion.so/my-integrations
connectors.next_implementation_step: Create Notion internal integration at notion.so, paste token via /v1/connectors/notion/connect

connectors.exact_blocker: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN present but connector diagnostics look for JARVIS_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN — var name mismatch. Fargate does not have token deployed. No auto-trigger on approval events.
connectors.next_implementation_step: Resolve env var name mapping (TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN → JARVIS_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN); wire auto-trigger on new pending approval; deploy token to Fargate
connectors.proof_for_acceptance: New pending approval queued → Telegram notification sent to confirmed chat; Bryan can respond to approve/deny

actions_available: POST /v1/mac-worker/queue — submit Mac-only task to queue
connectors.exact_blocker: Mac worker queue executes only when MacBook is online; no Fargate worker process; no push notification for completion status
connectors.next_implementation_step: Deploy Fargate worker for cloud-safe task execution; wire completion notifications
connectors.proof_for_acceptance: POST /v1/workbench/plan from iPhone creates plan; execution completes while MacBook off; result returned to iPhone

READONLY.description: Safe read operations, no approval needed

APPROVAL_REQUIRED.description: Any outbound send, write, or state-changing operation
APPROVAL_REQUIRED.gate: Must pass through Jarvis PA approval flow

DESTRUCTIVE_GATED.description: Hard-gated operations requiring explicit Bryan approval
DESTRUCTIVE_GATED.gate: Hard gate — Bryan explicit approval required, logged

CLOUD_SAFE.description: Can run on Fargate backend without MacBook

CONNECTOR_GATED.description: Requires connector OAuth token accessible in execution context
CONNECTOR_GATED.blocker: OAuth tokens local-only; vault migration required for MacBook-off

macbook_off_summary.global_blocker: Google OAuth tokens (Gmail/Calendar/GDrive) stored in local JSON files — no cloud vault migration implemented. Fargate cannot access local ~/.openjarvis/connectors/ files.
macbook_off_summary.next_milestone: Cloud vault integration for Google OAuth tokens (AWS Secrets Manager or equivalent)
